completedPhaseClaims.summary: Created planning and state scaffolding from existing spec/design. No implementation, runtime tests, artifact lint, validation, or certification executed.

Added inline UI Wireframes and User Flows sections to spec.md for connector health, QF packet rendering, evidence bundle export, Telegram summary, action boundary, and schema-mismatch scenarios. No runtime code or certification fields changed.

Reconciled design.md with UX wireframes and user flows for connector status, packet search/digest/detail cards, PersonalEvidenceBundle builder, Telegram summary, schema mismatch, action boundary, accessibility/responsive behavior, authorization, and scenario-to-test mapping. No runtime source code, scopes, report, uservalidation, or certification fields changed.

Performed an additional design-only reconciliation pass after inline UX sections were reviewed. Added an explicit UX contract reconciliation matrix tying connector status, packet search/digest/detail, evidence bundle builder, Telegram summary, sync/rendering, export, schema mismatch, and action-boundary flows to active design. No runtime source, scopes, report, uservalidation, docs, or certification fields changed.

Cross-repo design reconciliation pass against quantitativeFinance/specs/063-smackerel-companion-bridge/design.md. Added target_context (required) and source_refs (optional) to PersonalEvidenceBundle Bundle Fields table; added analysis_note -> qf/decision-packet+subtype mapping to content-type table; added explicit Reserved Schemas (Not Implemented Pre-MVP) subsection naming QFApprovalAction and QFWatchSignal with pre-MVP handling rules. Added Reconciliation Notes (2026-05-03) section. No spec, scopes, report, uservalidation, runtime source, or certification fields modified.

Plan reconciliation pass (mode: reconcile) folding the 2026-05-03 cross-repo design deltas into scopes.md only. Scope 2 makes the response-level next_cursor canonical (persisted in sync_state.sync_cursor), demotes per-event QFDecisionEvent.cursor to diagnostic-only, and binds QF decision_type to Smackerel content type per the Decision Type To Smackerel Content Type Mapping table (analysis_note preserved as qf/decision-packet + Metadata.decision_subtype). Scope 4 tightens the PersonalEvidenceBundle required field set, marks source_refs optional, and adds field-set parity with QF spec 063 import validation. Scope 5 adds explicit reserved-schema handling per the design's Reserved Schemas (Not Implemented Pre-MVP) subsection (QFApprovalAction normalized as qf/approval-request diagnostic-only with Metadata.reserved=true; QFWatchSignal recorded as diagnostic log only). All scope statuses remain Not Started; no runtime source, spec, design, or uservalidation fields changed; no certification claim made.

Final plan review pass after the prior reconciliation. Tightened scopes.md evidence-bundle shorthand in Validation Checkpoints, Scope 1 DTO contract, Scope 4 scenarios, Scope 4 test titles, and Scope 4 DoD so the canonical PersonalEvidenceBundle required fields, optional source_refs semantics, and source_artifact_ids terminology are consistent throughout planning. No scope status, DoD checkbox, runtime source, spec, design, uservalidation, or certification field changed.

executionHistory.summary: Created scopes.md, report.md, uservalidation.md, and state.json for the pre-MVP Smackerel QF Companion Connector. No source code changed and no validation commands run.
Added UX screen inventory, ASCII wireframes, responsive/accessibility states, and mermaid user flows inline in spec.md. No implementation, runtime tests, or certification promotion performed.

Updated design.md to align active technical design with the current spec.md UX truth: connector health, QF packet cards/detail, evidence builder, Telegram summary, degraded/schema mismatch behavior, action boundaries, access matrix, and precise scenario-to-test mapping. No source implementation or certification state changed.

Reviewed spec.md UX contracts against design.md and scopes.md, then added a UX contract reconciliation matrix to design.md. Active design remains read-only for QF decisions, consent-scoped for evidence export, diagnostic-only for schema mismatches, and non-mutating for approval/execution/mandate/watch/EmergencyStop boundaries.

Cross-repo design reconciliation pass against quantitativeFinance/specs/063-smackerel-companion-bridge/design.md. Added target_context (required) and source_refs (optional) to PersonalEvidenceBundle Bundle Fields table; added analysis_note -> qf/decision-packet+subtype mapping to content-type table; added explicit Reserved Schemas (Not Implemented Pre-MVP) subsection naming QFApprovalAction and QFWatchSignal with pre-MVP handling. Added Reconciliation Notes (2026-05-03) section. Artifact lint passed. No spec, scopes, report, uservalidation, runtime source, or certification fields changed.

Plan reconciliation pass (mode: reconcile) folding the 2026-05-03 cross-repo design deltas into scopes.md only. Scope 2 promotes response-level next_cursor to canonical advancement and demotes per-event cursor to diagnostic-only; analysis_note variants normalize to qf/decision-packet with Metadata.decision_subtype preserved. Scope 4 tightens the PersonalEvidenceBundle required field set with source_refs optional and adds QF spec 063 field-set parity. Scope 5 adds explicit reserved-schema handling for QFApprovalAction (normalize to qf/approval-request diagnostic with Metadata.reserved=true) and QFWatchSignal (diagnostic log only). All scope statuses remain Not Started; no runtime source, spec, design, or uservalidation fields changed; no certification claim made.

Final plan review pass after the prior reconciliation. Tightened scopes.md evidence-bundle shorthand in Validation Checkpoints, Scope 1 DTO contract, Scope 4 scenarios, Scope 4 test titles, and Scope 4 DoD so the canonical PersonalEvidenceBundle required fields, optional source_refs semantics, and source_artifact_ids terminology are consistent throughout planning. All scope statuses remain Not Started; no runtime source, spec, design, or uservalidation fields changed; no certification claim made.

notes: Initial planning/state scaffold only. Pre-MVP connector is read-only for QF decisions. Smackerel does not provide financial advice, approval, mandate changes, execution, or QF trust metadata reconstruction.
